title: TreeFellerRewritten
description: The most advanced, satisfying and simple Tree Feller Plugin for your Minecraft Server !
body:
# TreeFellerRewritten
**_SMALL DESCRIPTION_**                                                                            
As the name says, **TreeFellerRewritten** is an **advanced**, **modern** and **easy to use** Minecraft Plugin that allows players to **easily cut trees** by breaking **one log** !

**_FEATURES_**  
This plugin contains **alot** of **features** such as:
> MiniMessages Support                                                                                           
> Bstats                                                                                                   
> Big config                                                                                                  
> Many config options                                                                                     
> 100% configurable messages                                                                                                                            
> 1.18+ Support                                                                                 

**_BSTATS_**

![TreeFellerRewwritten Stats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/TreeFellerRewritten.svg)
